warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
A fukui reactivity analysis was performed on furan using DFT at the tier `standard` level (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, in the gas phase. The geometry was sourced from the user-provided `.xyz` file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz`); this was a single-point calculation. The neutral molecule had a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The cation had a charge of 1 and a multiplicity of 2, and the anion had a charge of -1 and a multiplicity of 2.

The most electrophilic site (highest fukui f+ index) is Carbon 5 (C), with an f+ value of 1.9242931.
The most nucleophilic site (highest fukui f- index) is also Carbon 5 (C), with an f- value of 0.1616371.

**Fukui Reactivity Indices and Dual Descriptor per atom (Mulliken charges, PySCF):**

| Atom Index (0-based) | Symbol | Fukui f+ | Fukui f- | Fukui f0 | Dual Descriptor |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | O | -1.3316182 | 0.08382155 | -0.62389834 | -1.4154398 |
| 1 | C | 1.2286866 | 0.089103093 | 0.65889484 | 1.1395835 |
| 2 | C | 1.2270264 | 0.089304821 | 0.65816562 | 1.1377216 |
| 3 | C | 1.9233053 | 0.161527 | 1.0424161 | 1.7617783 |
| 4 | C | 1.9242931 | 0.1616371 | 1.0429651 | 1.762656 |
| 5 | H | -1.2190639 | 0.10248412 | -0.55828991 | -1.3215481 |
| 6 | H | -1.2191056 | 0.1025135 | -0.55829603 | -1.321619 |
| 7 | H | -0.76678308 | 0.10481615 | -0.33098346 | -0.87159923 |
| 8 | H | -0.76674059 | 0.10479266 | -0.33097396 | -0.87153325 |
